name: La-Z-Boy Incorporated
description: La-Z-Boy Incorporated is a prominent global leader in the residential furniture industry, renowned for its iconic reclining chairs and comprehensive upholstery products. The company manufactures, markets, imports, exports, distributes, and retails a wide range of furniture through its Wholesale and Retail segments. Operating a vast network of over 370 La-Z-Boy stores, including numerous company-owned locations, the firm brings both timeless and modern furniture designs to consumers. Headquartered in the United States, La-Z-Boy continues to maintain a strong market presence by combining traditional craftsmanship with contemporary digital retail strategies to serve customers internationally.
